scripts.check:go: bun run vet:go && bun run test:go && bun run build:go
scripts.build:python: cd sdks/python && python3 -m pip wheel . -w dist --no-deps -q
scripts.test:python: bash -c 'if [ -d sdks/python/tests ]; then cd sdks/python && python3 -m pytest tests -q; else echo "No tests/ yet; skipping pytest"; fi'
scripts.build:sdks: bun run build:python && bun run build:typescript
scripts.clean: rm -rf sdks/python/dist sdks/python/*.egg-info sdks/python/build sdks/typescript/dist node_modules
